 {"id":"bd-2pe5","title":"demo_showcase: README docs","description":"Add a Demo Showcase section to README with recommended commands and what it demonstrates.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:46:55.945257835Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:56:50.973620010Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","docs"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2pe5","depends_on_id":"bd-1jk8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:55:09.161637790Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2pe5","depends_on_id":"bd-26gp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:56:50.973585556Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2pe5","depends_on_id":"bd-2b0s","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:55:11.563746228Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2pe5","depends_on_id":"bd-ohsq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:46:55.957608250Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":59,"issue_id":"bd-2pe5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## README section content

Include:
- One-liner: what the demo is
- Best command: `cargo run --bin demo_showcase --features full,tracing`
- CI-safe command: `cargo run --bin demo_showcase --features full,tracing -- --no-live --no-screen --no-interactive` (or equivalent)
- Short bullet list of what it demonstrates
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:47:05Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2rqt","title":"API misuse detection tests","description":"## Problem
Users can easily misuse the API (e.g., using Cell::new() instead of Cell::from_markup()). We need tests that document these gotchas and ensure the API behaves predictably.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Document all methods that accept strings but DON'T parse markup
- [ ] Document all methods that DO parse markup  
- [ ] Add tests that explicitly show the difference
- [ ] Consider adding deprecation warnings or lints for confusing APIs

## API Audit checklist
- [ ] Cell::new() - does NOT parse markup (documented)
- [ ] Cell::from_markup() - DOES parse markup (documented)
- [ ] Text::new() - does NOT parse markup
- [ ] Text::from_markup() - DOES parse markup
- [ ] Panel title/content - audit and document
- [ ] Tree labels - audit and document
- [ ] Progress descriptions - audit and document

## Files to modify
- Add doc comments to all relevant structs/methods
- tests/conformance/*.rs - add explicit documentation tests","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T05:00:09.661046714Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T10:00:40.238099951Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T10:00:40.238082187Z","close_reason":"Documented markup parsing behavior across Text/Panel/Tree/Progress/Table; added conformance tests for Text vs markup","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["task"]}
-{"id":"bd-2rxj","title":"demo_showcase: RichLogger integration","description":"Integrate RichLogger into demo_showcase and route logs through Live when active.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:43:42.813671250Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:54:12.822398024Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","logging"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2rxj","depends_on_id":"bd-1gou","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:54:10.277694461Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2rxj","depends_on_id":"bd-1jk8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:54:12.822369090Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2rxj","depends_on_id":"bd-2xsi","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:43:42.825595399Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":45,"issue_id":"bd-2rxj","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Integration

- Initialize `RichLogger` early in `main` when enabled by config.
- Use it to emit realistic logs during pipeline simulation (build/test/deploy).
- Avoid `println!` during Live; use console/logs so Live render hook can manage cursor control.

## Acceptance criteria

- Logs appear styled by level and include useful metadata (time/level/path where appropriate).
- Logger does not break non-interactive mode (still prints readable lines).
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:44:13Z"}]}

- Avoid `println!` during Live; use console/logs so Live render hook can manage cursor control.

## Acceptance criteria

- Logs appear styled by level and include useful metadata (time/level/path where appropriate).
- Logger does not break non-interactive mode (still prints readable lines).

 {"id":"bd-2sa2","title":"Style verification test helpers","description":"## Problem
Current tests often just check that output is non-empty or doesn't crash. We need test helpers that can actually VERIFY styles were applied correctly.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Create test_utils module with helper functions for style verification
- [ ] Helper to check if output contains ANSI color codes
- [ ] Helper to check if specific style was applied (bold, italic, color)
- [ ] Helper to extract styled segments from rendered output
- [ ] Document how to use these helpers in tests

## Implementation Notes
- Could check for ANSI escape sequences like \x1b[1m for bold
- Could provide segment inspection utilities
- Make it easy to write assertions like assert_has_bold!(output)

## Files to create/modify
- tests/test_utils.rs or tests/common/mod.rs - create helpers
- Update existing tests to use these helpers where appropriate","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T04:59:29.751175627Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T07:05:38.109472650Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T07:05:38.109159270Z","close_reason":"Added comprehensive style verification helpers to tests/common/assertions.rs: ansi module with constants, style assertions (bold/italic/underline/color), strip_ansi, and extract_styled_regions","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["task"]}
 {"id":"bd-2sk1","title":"demo_showcase: automated test suite (unit + e2e + snapshots)","description":"Add comprehensive unit + integration + snapshot tests for demo_showcase (with detailed logging) to prevent regressions.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:09:38.949498076Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:09:51.444835092Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","qa","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2sk1","depends_on_id":"bd-3m5v","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:09:38.968252493Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":65,"issue_id":"bd-2sk1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Why this exists

The showcase is meant to be a *flagship* artifact, so it needs flagship testing:
- Output regressions are subtle and easy to introduce during refactors.
- Live/TTY behavior can break silently without automated checks.
- Export artifacts (HTML/SVG) are particularly prone to drift.

## Testing philosophy

We want three layers:

1. **Unit tests (fast, internal)**
   - CLI parsing, config defaults, scene registry ordering
   - small pure helpers (badges/formatting)

2. **Integration/e2e smoke tests (black-box)**
   - Spawn the compiled binary via `CARGO_BIN_EXE_demo_showcase`
   - Run each scene with CI-safe flags (`--no-live --no-screen --no-interactive --quick`)
   - Assert exit code, bounded runtime (timeout), and key output markers

3. **Snapshot/golden tests (visual regression)**
   - Capture deterministic text output (fixed `--width/--height`, `--color-system none` or ANSI-stripped)
   - Use `insta` snapshots for key scenes

## Logging requirements

All integration tests should emit structured debug logs (via `test-log` + `tracing`) including:
- command line executed
- env overrides
- runtime duration
- output sizes
- first/last N lines on failure (without spamming CI)

## Acceptance criteria

- `cargo test` passes quickly and runs unit + basic smoke tests.
- `cargo test --features full,tracing` runs the full snapshot suite (including content scenes).
- E2E tests fail with actionable logs when a scene hangs or output changes unexpectedly.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:09:51Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2smc","title":"demo_showcase: dashboard layout + live updates","description":"Build the core split-screen dashboard (Layout) and drive it with Live updates (progress/logs).","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:35:36.694609635Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:38:49.077869634Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","layout","live"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2smc","depends_on_id":"bd-1388","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:38:49.077815984Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2smc","depends_on_id":"bd-2fl5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:49:30.240263939Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2smc","depends_on_id":"bd-3g9v","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:49:27.173009186Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2smc","depends_on_id":"bd-3m5v","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:35:36.713272217Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":7,"issue_id":"bd-2smc","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Dashboard concept

Create a single “mission control” dashboard that stays on screen and updates live:
- **Header**: app name + run id + clock + key status badges
- **Main**: pipeline progress (multi-step), current action panel
- **Sidebar**: service status table + quick facts
- **Footer**: streaming logs (tail) + hints (“press q”, etc.)

This should be the primary wow-moment: layout + live refresh + dense styling.

## Technical approach

- Model a `DemoState` struct (progress values, current step, log ring buffer, service status, etc.).
- Use `Live::get_renderable(|| Box<dyn Renderable>)` with a closure that builds a fresh `Layout` from the current state snapshot.
- Default to `LiveOptions { screen: true, ... }` when interactive; provide flags to disable.
- Keep refresh rate modest (e.g. 10 fps max) and driven by `LiveOptions.refresh_per_second`.

## Acceptance criteria

- In an interactive terminal, the dashboard updates smoothly and exits cleanly (cursor restored; no leftover alt-screen unless `--screen`).
- In non-interactive mode, a static “snapshot” dashboard is printed once (no live loop).
- Layout adapts to narrow terminals: if width < threshold, collapse sidebar or switch to single-column mode.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:35:46Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-325x","title":"demo_showcase: tracing integration","description":"Integrate RichTracingLayer (feature `tracing`) and emit spans/events during the demo.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:43:45.281658744Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:54:17.530726003Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","tracing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-325x","depends_on_id":"bd-1jk8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:54:17.530697440Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-325x","depends_on_id":"bd-2rxj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:54:15.168605259Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-325x","depends_on_id":"bd-2xsi","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:43:45.305949215Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":46,"issue_id":"bd-325x","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Feature gating

This scene is only fully enabled with crate feature `tracing`.

## Plan

- Install `RichTracingLayer` when available.
- Emit a few spans/events tied to the narrative (request span, deploy span, warning event).
- Ensure output is still nice when tracing is disabled: print a short panel explaining how to enable it (`--features full,tracing`).

## Acceptance criteria

- With feature enabled, tracing output is visible and styled, and does not fight with Live rendering.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:44:20Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-37jy","title":"demo_showcase: columns/align/padding scene","description":"Create a scene that spotlights Columns/Align/Padding helpers for polished UI composition.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:42:16.940361950Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:19.590195074Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","layout"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-37jy","depends_on_id":"bd-1jk8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:14.716468472Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-37jy","depends_on_id":"bd-2175","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:42:16.953561734Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-37jy","depends_on_id":"bd-2hba","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:17.101542Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-37jy","depends_on_id":"bd-313x","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:19.590168494Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":40,"issue_id":"bd-37jy","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Goal

Spotlight compositional tools that make output feel like UI:
- `Columns` for side-by-side cards
- `Align` for centering and right-align callouts
- `Padding` for spacing and “card” feel

## Acceptance criteria

- Scene uses these helpers intentionally (not just contrived samples).
- Demonstrates at least one centered hero block and one multi-column card layout.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:42:55Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-39jb","title":"Update .beads docs/config for br","description":"The checked-in .beads/README.md and .beads/config.yaml still document legacy bd commands/links, but this repo uses beads_rust via br.

Acceptance criteria:
- Update .beads/README.md to reference br commands (create/list/show/update/close/sync --flush-only)
- Update .beads/config.yaml comments/examples to match beads_rust and current env var prefixes
- Keep content short and repo-specific (rich_rust)

-{"id":"bd-3bid","title":"demo_showcase: non-interactive + cross-platform safeguards","description":"Ensure demo is safe in CI / pipes: no hangs, controlled ANSI output, graceful fallbacks for low-capability terminals.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:37:01.548646777Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:14:22.423371170Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","compat","demo_showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bid","depends_on_id":"bd-12nv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:49:52.043690257Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3bid","depends_on_id":"bd-3g9v","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:49:49.644768189Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3bid","depends_on_id":"bd-3m5v","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:37:01.575646062Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":12,"issue_id":"bd-3bid","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Key behaviors

- Auto-detect non-interactive contexts (`Console::is_terminal()` / `Console::is_interactive()`) and disable:
  - Live animation
  - Alt-screen
  - Prompts / pager
- Provide explicit override flags (`--force-terminal`, `--no-live`, `--no-interactive`).

## Safety / polish

- If ANSI is disabled, the output should still be readable (no half-rendered control codes).
- Keep log/progress output bounded; never spam infinite frames into pipes.
- Prefer a final static summary when not interactive.

## Acceptance criteria

- `cargo run --bin demo_showcase --features full,tracing | cat` completes quickly and produces finite output.
- `FORCE_COLOR=1` (or `--force-terminal`) enables color even when piped.
- Narrow terminals (< ~70 cols) switch layout mode rather than producing ugly wrapping chaos.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:37:10Z"},{"id":79,"issue_id":"bd-3bid","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Automation note

This safeguard work should be backed by automated tests (see `bd-zzss` + `bd-3qbk`) so CI catches hangs/infinite output.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:14:22Z"}]}
+{"id":"bd-3bid","title":"demo_showcase: non-interactive + cross-platform safeguards","description":"Ensure demo is safe in CI / pipes: no hangs, controlled ANSI output, graceful fallbacks for low-capability terminals.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"RedWaterfall","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:37:01.548646777Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T02:33:24.846262423Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T02:33:24.846200658Z","close_reason":"Non-interactive safeguards verified: piped output completes in <10s with finite 5604 bytes, --force-terminal enables ANSI when piped, narrow width (60 cols) produces clean output. All CLI flags (--no-interactive, --no-live, --no-screen, --quick) are implemented.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","compat","demo_showcase"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3bid","depends_on_id":"bd-12nv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:49:52.043690257Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3bid","depends_on_id":"bd-3g9v","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:49:49.644768189Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3bid","depends_on_id":"bd-3m5v","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:37:01.575646062Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":12,"issue_id":"bd-3bid","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Key behaviors

- Auto-detect non-interactive contexts (`Console::is_terminal()` / `Console::is_interactive()`) and disable:
  - Live animation
  - Alt-screen
  - Prompts / pager
- Provide explicit override flags (`--force-terminal`, `--no-live`, `--no-interactive`).

## Safety / polish

- If ANSI is disabled, the output should still be readable (no half-rendered control codes).
- Keep log/progress output bounded; never spam infinite frames into pipes.
- Prefer a final static summary when not interactive.

## Acceptance criteria

- `cargo run --bin demo_showcase --features full,tracing | cat` completes quickly and produces finite output.
- `FORCE_COLOR=1` (or `--force-terminal`) enables color even when piped.
- Narrow terminals (< ~70 cols) switch layout mode rather than producing ugly wrapping chaos.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:37:10Z"},{"id":79,"issue_id":"bd-3bid","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Automation note

This safeguard work should be backed by automated tests (see `bd-zzss` + `bd-3qbk`) so CI catches hangs/infinite output.
","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:14:22Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3c90","title":"Full Python Rich parity (beyond current core)","description":"Owner request: remove/exhaust all parity gaps vs upstream Python Rich (currently 13.9.4 in conformance env).

Track missing modules/features (theme, emoji codes, pretty/inspect, traceback, prompt/input, status/pager, advanced progress, etc), expand conformance fixtures, and update RICH_SPEC/FEATURE_PARITY accordingly.

Definition of done:
- All Python Rich public modules/features have Rust equivalents or documented Rust-idiomatic equivalents
- Conformance coverage expanded to cover new features and matches Python outputs where applicable
- README + docs reflect full parity
","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-27T18:37:32.006665146Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T21:32:51.033535763Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-3czr","title":"demo_showcase tests: live-mode smoke (forced terminal)","description":"Add an e2e test that runs a short live-mode demo with --force-terminal and verifies clean start/stop (bounded output).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:15:32.595139460Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T23:16:04.133804147Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","live","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3czr","depends_on_id":"bd-11zc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:15:57.009936649Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3czr","depends_on_id":"bd-1jk8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:16:01.756140396Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3czr","depends_on_id":"bd-2sk1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:15:32.610780062Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3czr","depends_on_id":"bd-3fph","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:15:59.337713117Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3czr","depends_on_id":"bd-3s5n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:16:04.133777066Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":80,"issue_id":"bd-3czr","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Test intent

We can't fully validate “looks great in a real TTY” in CI, but we *can* validate that live mode:
- starts successfully
- runs for a bounded amount of time
- stops cleanly (no panic)

## Approach

- Run with `--force-terminal --live --no-screen --quick --speed <fast>`
- Keep duration bounded (e.g. runner has an internal max tick count in non-interactive contexts, or test passes a `--max-frames` style flag if we add one)
- Assert exit 0 and output is within an upper bound

## Dependencies

This requires the live driver to exist (`bd-3fph`) and the scene runner (`bd-1jk8`).
","created_at":"2026-01-27T23:15:45Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3ff5","title":"demo_showcase: table showcase scene","description":"Create a table-heavy scene (services/metrics) demonstrating alignment, styles, and status badges.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:42:09.286125556Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:00.254896722Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["demo_showcase","table"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3ff5","depends_on_id":"bd-1by8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:51:57.978791963Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3ff5","depends_on_id":"bd-1jk8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:51:55.616329317Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3ff5","depends_on_id":"bd-2175","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:42:09.299506237Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3ff5","depends_on_id":"bd-2hba","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:52:00.254870092Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":37,"issue_id":"bd-3ff5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Table targets

Demonstrate:
- header styling + column justification
- min/max widths + wrapping
- markup cells (status badges)
- numeric alignment

Use realistic data: services, versions, latency, error rate, region, etc.

## Acceptance criteria

- Looks good both wide and narrow (narrow may omit columns).
- Includes at least one ASCII fallback example (or shows how to toggle).
","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:42:34Z"}]}
